datasets.description: AWG wire ampacity, chassis wiring / single conductor in free air. Rule-of-thumb reference (Handbook of Electronic Tables and Formulas, via powerstream.com) — NOT an NEC-compliance-grade table, same representative/unverified tier as this catalog's material data.
datasets.source: Handbook of Electronic Tables and Formulas (rule-of-thumb, chassis wiring free-air) -- https://www.powerstream.com/Wire_Size.htm
